description: Multi-tool workflow: inspect an asset, plan edits, execute via transaction
text:
Step 1: Identify the target asset path
Step 2: Use claireon.asset_search() or claireon.asset_list() to find the asset
Step 3: Inspect its properties with the appropriate inspect tool (e.g., claireon.blueprint_inspect(), claireon.state_tree_inspect())
Step 4: Plan your changes based on the inspected state
Step 5: Begin a transaction with claireon.transaction('begin', 'description of changes')
Step 6: Apply changes using the appropriate edit tool
Step 7: Complete the transaction with claireon.transaction('end')
Step 8: Re-inspect to verify the changes took effect
